mapper.select: select a.pur_order_date ,a.seq ,a.delivery_date ,dbo.getCustomerName(a.customer_cd) as customer_name ,a.item_type_cd ,a.customer_cd ,a.area_cd ,a.storage_cd ,dbo.getStorageName(a.storage_cd) as storageName ,a.remark ,a.manager_id ,a.customer_manager_name as customerManagerName ,a.vat_type ,dbo.getUserName(a.manager_id) as manager_name ,isnull(a.mail_yn, 'N') as mail_yn ,isnull(a.print_yn, 'N') as print_yn ,isnull(a.end_yn, 'N') as end_yn ,isnull(a.in_yn, 'N') as in_yn ,a.pur_order_id from tb_purm_order_mst a where a.pur_order_id = #{purOrderId}
select a.item_cd ,a.item_name ,a.item_type_cd ,a.spec ,a.qty ,a.in_price ,a.supply_price ,a.vat_price ,a.etc ,a.pur_order_id from tb_purm_order_mst a where a.pur_order_id = #{purOrderId}

select a.pur_order_date ,a.seq ,a.delivery_date ,dbo.getCustomerName(a.customer_cd) as customer_name ,a.item_type_cd ,a.customer_cd ,a.area_cd ,a.storage_cd ,dbo.getStorageName(a.storage_cd) as storageName ,a.remark ,a.manager_id ,a.customer_manager_name ,a.vat_type ,dbo.getUserName(a.manager_id) as manager_name ,isnull(a.mail_yn, 'N') as mail_yn ,isnull(a.print_yn, 'N') as print_yn ,isnull(a.end_yn, 'N') as end_yn ,a.pur_order_id from tb_purp_order_mst a where a.pur_order_id = #{purOrderId}
select a.item_cd ,a.item_name ,a.item_type_cd ,a.spec ,a.qty ,a.in_price ,a.supply_price ,a.vat_price ,a.etc ,a.pur_order_id from tb_purp_order_item a where a.pur_order_id = #{purOrderId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_purm_order_mst ( pur_order_date, seq, area_cd, storage_cd, customer_cd, manager_id, delivery_date, customer_manager_name, remark, item_type_cd, item_cd, item_name, spec, qty, in_price, supply_price, vat_price, vat_type, mail_yn, print_yn, etc, reg_id, upd_id ) VALUES
( #{purchaseOrderInfo.purOrderDate}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.seq}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.areaCd}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.storageCd}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.customerCd}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.managerId}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.deliveryDate}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.customerManagerName}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.remark},
#{purchaseOrderInfo.itemTypeCd}, #{item.itemCd}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.spec}, #{item.qty}, #{item.inPrice}, #{item.supplyPrice}, #{item.vatPrice}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.vatType}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.mailYn}, #{purchaseOrderInfo.printYn}, #{item.etc}, isnull(#{purchaseOrderInfo.userId}, 'SYSTEM'), isnull(#{purchaseOrderInfo.userId}, 'SYSTEM') )

INSERT INTO dbo.tb_purp_order_mst ( pur_order_date, seq, area_cd, storage_cd, customer_cd, item_type_cd, manager_id, delivery_date, customer_manager_name, remark, vat_type,reg_id, reg_dt, upd_id, upd_dt ) VALUES ( #{purOrderDate}, #{seq}, #{areaCd}, #{storageCd}, #{customerCd}, #{itemTypeCd}, #{managerId}, #{deliveryDate}, #{customerManagerName}, #{remark}, #{vatType},#{userId}, GETDATE(), #{userId}, GETDATE() )

INSERT INTO dbo.tb_purp_order_item ( pur_order_id, item_cd, item_name, item_type_cd, spec, qty, in_price, supply_price, vat_price, end_yn, etc, reg_id, upd_id )VALUES
( #{item.purOrderId}, #{item.itemCd}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.itemTypeCd}, #{item.spec}, #{item.qty}, #{item.inPrice}, #{item.supplyPrice}, #{item.vatPrice}, COALESCE(#{item.endYn}, 'N'), #{item.etc}, #{userId}, #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_purm_order_mst SET pur_order_date = #{purchaseOrderInfo.purOrderDate}, seq = #{purchaseOrderInfo.seq}, area_cd = #{purchaseOrderInfo.areaCd}, storage_cd = #{purchaseOrderInfo.storageCd}, customer_cd = #{purchaseOrderInfo.customerCd}, manager_id = #{purchaseOrderInfo.managerId}, delivery_date = #{purchaseOrderInfo.deliveryDate}, customer_manager_name = #{purchaseOrderInfo.customerManagerName}, remark = #{purchaseOrderInfo.remark}, vat_type = #{purchaseOrderInfo.vatType}, mail_yn = isnull(#{purchaseOrderInfo.mailYn}, 'N'), print_yn = isnull(#{purchaseOrderInfo.printYn}, 'N'), in_yn = isnull(#{purchaseOrderInfo.inYn}, 'N'), end_yn = isnull(#{purchaseOrderInfo.endYn}, 'N'), item_type_cd = #{purchaseOrderInfo.itemTypeCd}, item_cd = #{purchaseOrderItemList[0].itemCd}, item_name = #{purchaseOrderItemList[0].itemName}, spec = #{purchaseOrderItemList[0].spec}, qty = #{purchaseOrderItemList[0].qty}, in_price = #{purchaseOrderItemList[0].inPrice}, supply_price = #{purchaseOrderItemList[0].supplyPrice}, vat_price = #{purchaseOrderItemList[0].vatPrice}, etc = #{purchaseOrderItemList[0].etc}, upd_id = isnull(#{purchaseOrderInfo.userId}, 'SYSTEM') WHERE pur_order_id = #{purchaseOrderInfo.purOrderId}

UPDATE dbo.tb_purp_order_mst SET pur_order_date = #{purOrderDate}, seq = #{seq}, area_cd = #{areaCd}, storage_cd = #{storageCd}, customer_cd = #{customerCd}, manager_id = #{managerId}, delivery_date = #{deliveryDate}, customer_manager_name = #{customerManagerName}, remark = #{remark}, vat_type = #{vatType}, mail_yn = COALESCE(#{mailYn}, mail_yn), print_yn = COALESCE(#{printYn}, print_yn), end_yn = COALESCE(#{endYn}, end_yn), upd_id = #{userId}, upd_dt = GETDATE() WHERE pur_order_id = #{purOrderId}
mapper.select:
select a.pur_order_id ,sum(a.qty) as totOrderQty ,sum(a.supply_price) as totSupplyAmt ,sum(a.vat_price) as totVat ,sum(a.supply_price)+sum(a.vat_price) as totAmt
from
tb_purm_order_mst a
tb_purp_order_item a
where a.pur_order_id = #{purOrderId} group by a.pur_order_id
mapper.update:
update tb_purm_order_mst
update tb_purp_order_mst
set mail_yn = 'Y' where pur_order_id in
#{id}
